'''Melasaton''' was a low-tech [[Planet/Legends|planet]] devastated by a great plague. It was saved from the plague when [[Arbor Industries]] developed an antidote, even though it was Arbor Industries that secretly unleashed the plague in the first place.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Deadly Hunter]]'' {{1stm}}
